name: Covered bond purchase programme
description_short: Data on the ECB's covered bond purchase programmes (CBPP1, CBPP2, CBPP3), including holdings, purchases, and redemptions. Tracks the ECB's direct interventions in covered bond markets as part of its unconventional monetary policy.
use_cases: What is the current stock of covered bonds held by the ECB under CBPP3?
How have ECB covered bond purchases evolved over time?
What is the redemption profile of the ECB's covered bond portfolio?
Which countries' covered bonds make up the largest share of ECB holdings?
